description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.
425 plugins, 2,810 skills, 200 agents for Claude Code. Open-source marketplace at tonsofskills.com with the ccpi CLI package manager.
Open-source library of AI agent skills — SKILL.md files for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor

CLI tool and AI agent skill for reading and writing ABAP source code and metadata from SAP systems (ECC · S/4HANA · BTP) via the ADT REST API. Supports programs, classes, CDS views, DDIC objects, transport management, Open SQL queries, and object search — with fine-grained permission flags for all write operations.
Open-source CLI scanner for agentic AI components such as skills, MCP servers, system prompts
Open-source skill registry for AI agents—discover, fork, and ship.

This repository is a curated collection of skills, plugins, and automation pipelines designed for Claude Code — Anthropic's CLI for AI-assisted software engineering.  It was built by the engineering and security engineering teams at Phoenix Security and released as open source so that security professionals, DevSecOps engineers, AppSec teams
Open-source ReAct AI coding agent in Go with TUI. Works with Cursor, Zed via ACP. Supports any OpenAI-compatible providers. Can use SKILLS and MCP servers.
AI-Powered Terminal Assistant - Open-source alternative to Claude Code Skills with cost savings. Supports DeepSeek/Qwen/Ollama & offline mode
Open-source agent skills for Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini CLI. Connect AI agents to Google Analytics, Search Console, and Drive. From Temi (usetemi.com).
Scan and standardize open-source repos in seconds. CLI + Claude Code skill + OpenClaw skill.
Provide open-source Claude Code skills to access HyperX wallet analytics, market data, and social feeds for enhanced trading insights.
The company brain for AI agents. Compile scattered company knowledge into Claude Agent Skills (SKILL.md). Open-source CLI + hosted product. YC S26.
Open-source Claude Code skill for clinical indication research: MoA landscape, compound landscape, endpoint framework, study designs. Outputs structured Word/PDF dossiers.
Open-source Claude Code skill for quantitative clinical trial design: sample size, Bayesian Go/No-Go, frequentist sensitivity, power curves, PPOS. R-based, generates CSV + PDF.
💡 Learn Bash scripting basics and start writing scripts with this open-source guide. Perfect for beginners looking to enhance their skills.
Open-source CLI for managing private React component registries — publish, install, search, and share components with your team. Works with any AI agent that supports SKILL.md (Claude Code, Cursor).
Build and run code across Rust and other workspaces with Claw Code, a tool for parity checks, usage flows, and roadmap tracking

Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. MIT-licensed, BYO agent CLI — Claude Code, Kimi, Codex, or any SDK-compatible model. Composable skills · three edit paths · designs as plain HTML/JSX/CSS folders · run locally, no cloud round-trip. Generate banners, thumbnails, websites, animations, design systems.

Multi-agent open-source programming and task-execution toolkit. Rust workspace with a permission-aware runtime, pluggable provider routing (OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, Ollama, OpenAI-compatible gateways), built-in tool catalog (shell/web/files/skills/memory), session persistence, /metrics, and a zero-build WebUI + wry desktop shell.
